oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Remote-workspace phase 2: forward the IPC socket + install shell integration remotely so a remote Claude pane gets live busy/idle, auto-title, and OSC-7 pwd tracking (deferred from PR #66).
Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.5.5) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Released v1.5.5 (build 479) — sidebar/session-overview UX batch. Session overview grid (Cmd+Shift+O) gains a sort control (Default vs Session State: needs-input > busy > idle > fresh, persisted, `s` cycles; ordering in tian/Session/SessionOverviewSort.swift, unit-tested) — PR #78. Overview overlay lifted above every sessionContentStack branch with auto-dismiss re-keyed to a global hasAnySession, opens from the empty create-session page, and the sidebar workspace header now activates its workspace on title/row click with a new leading chevron for fold (Return mirrors click, VoiceOver disclosure restored) — PR #79/#80. Notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live. GUI click/keystroke path not yet human-verified.

Released v1.5.4 — workspace now survives its last session — closing the last session no longer closes the workspace; its content area shows a new create-session empty state (SessionEmptyStateView) where the Claude pane renders. Removed the session→workspace auto-close cascade (SessionCollection.onEmpty/shouldQuit, Workspace.onEmpty, WorkspaceCollection.wireWorkspaceClose); explicit workspace close unchanged. Medium code-review caught a HIGH persistence data-loss (an empty workspace made SessionRestorer.validate discard the whole state file on restore) — fixed by dropping zero-session workspaces in SessionSerializer.snapshot; plus a session-overview flag desync (PR #76). 1032 tianTests pass (one WorktreeOrchestrator wall-clock flake, green in isolation). Built, notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.

Released v1.5.3 — Session Overview card no longer shows harness-injected synthetic turns (e.g. a background-subagent <task-notification> wrapper) in the 'latest user prompt' line; the UserPromptSubmit hook (tian-hook-prompt.sh) now rejects a prompt whose leading content is an injected wrapper tag (task-notification / system-reminder / local-command-* / command-* / bash-*) before forwarding, so only genuine typed input updates the card (PR #75). Added a standalone bash test that stubs the $TIAN_CLI_PATH seam (10 cases: 5 rejected, 5 forwarded, incl. a tag-boundary case). Medium code-review: no findings. Built (build 457), notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live.
